judgment_delta: Synthetic probe Story resolution could violate schema 0.2 catalog ownership -> resolved: execution-state now classifies only the selected Story's canonical route template, and DRS-CONTRACT-009 plus OCR-S-9 cover the schema 0.2 named-profile route.

Post-merge sync might regress legacy flat artifact routing or rollback -> resolved: the architecture explicitly preserves flat-parent lifecycle copying and targeted execution-state/artifact-routing coverage passed at a910.

A real runtime failure might accidentally cross PR or merge authority -> resolved: the guarded Run stopped with max_iterations_exceeded after an unknown provider run; its journal did not reach PR creation or merge, and a910 pr-prepare has ready_for_pr_create=false with execution-gate blockers.

Historical PR #385 / pr-merge evidence might be mistaken for current authority -> resolved: it is stale relative to a910; only regenerated current-head pr-prepare plus the explicit VibePro PR/merge lifecycle can authorize a later action.

findings.detail: The real guarded Run encountered an unknown external provider run and then stopped at its one-iteration policy limit. This is not proof of a healthy provider-success path; resolve the provider record before relying on that Run operationally. Release authority remained contained: no journal action reached PR creation or merge, and pr-prepare remained fail-closed.
The inspected worktree advanced to 63ba8d1d after the frozen a910 evidence was collected. Re-run this strict-head review and the gate preparation flow for any later commit.
